live_reaction_summary: A true live MLB window was present and the runtime/dashboard surfaces remained coherent, but the observed sample did not expose enough recommendation-side change over time to prove that the tighter cadence produced a clearly stronger live reaction end-to-end.
cadence_progression_summary: Cadence is objectively tighter in code, but the sampled live window did not capture enough game-state/recommendation progression deltas to elevate the result from PARTIAL to VERIFIED.
mismatch: No hard mismatch or instability was observed; the limitation was insufficient observable live progression, not a contradiction.
why_not_verified: No sufficient recommendation-output delta was captured in the sampled live window.
No enough over-time live change was observed to prove the faster cadence materially improved reaction behavior during that exact sample.
